name: demo-builder
description: UiPath demo builder with skills, agents, and commands for turning a use case into a demo-grade solution.

interface.shortDescription: Build demo-grade UiPath Agentic Orchestration solutions.
interface.longDescription: Use UiPath Demo Builder to plan and scaffold presales demos from a use case or account brief, including discovery, Data Fabric modeling, Case Management design, AI agents, coded app frontend specs, and a demo script.
defaultPrompt: Build a UiPath demo for Commercial Insurance Claims Triage.
Create a case management demo from this use case brief.
Plan a UiPath Coded Web App demo for this account.
